title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
